sources.expression:
$wpdb->get_var( // phpcs:ignore
				$wpdb->prepare(
					"SELECT ID FROM $wpdb->users WHERE user_login = %s OR ID = %d;",
					$user_login,
					$user_login
				)
			)

$wpdb->get_results(
				$wpdb->prepare(
					"SELECT option_name, option_value FROM $options_table_name WHERE option_name LIKE %s", // phpcs:ignore WordPress.DB.PreparedSQL.InterpolatedNotPrepared
					'wsal_%'
				),
				ARRAY_A
			)
$wpdb->get_results( $wpdb->prepare( "SELECT * FROM $wpdb->posts WHERE post_content LIKE %s AND post_name LIKE 'taxonomy%'", '%' . $taxonomy . '%' ), ARRAY_A )

sinks.expression:
printf( /* Translators: 1.CSS classes, 2. Notice, 3. Contact us link */ '

%2$s %3$s ' . \esc_html__( '%4$s to help you solve this issue.', 'wp-security-audit-log' ) . '

', \esc_attr( $class ), '' . \esc_html__( 'ERROR:', 'wp-security-audit-log' ) . '', \esc_html( $message ), '' . \esc_html__( 'Contact us', 'wp-security-audit-log' ) . '' )

$_wpdb->query( 'SELECT COUNT(1) IndexIsThere FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.STATISTICS WHERE table_schema=DATABASE() AND table_name="' . self::get_table_name( $connection ) . '" AND index_name="name_value"' )

$wpdb->get_var( // phpcs:ignore
				$wpdb->prepare(
					"SELECT ID FROM $wpdb->users WHERE user_login = %s OR ID = %d;",
					$user_login,
					$user_login
				)
			)

$wpdb->get_results(
				$wpdb->prepare(
					"SELECT option_name, option_value FROM $options_table_name WHERE option_name LIKE %s", // phpcs:ignore WordPress.DB.PreparedSQL.InterpolatedNotPrepared
					'wsal_%'
				),
				ARRAY_A
			)
wp_die( esc_html__( 'You do not have sufficient permissions to access this page.', 'wp-security-audit-log' ) )
wp_die( esc_html__( 'You do not have sufficient permissions to access this page.', 'wp-security-audit-log' ) )
wp_send_json_success( esc_html__( 'Plugin settings have been reset.', 'wp-security-audit-log' ) )
wp_die( esc_html__( 'You do not have sufficient permissions to access this page.', 'wp-security-audit-log' ) )
$wpdb->get_results( $wpdb->prepare( "SELECT * FROM $wpdb->posts WHERE post_content LIKE %s AND post_name LIKE 'taxonomy%'", '%' . $taxonomy . '%' ), ARRAY_A )

fwrite( $output, '

sanitizers.expression:
$wpdb->prepare(
					"SELECT meta_id AS option_id, meta_key AS option_name, meta_value AS option_value FROM {$wpdb->sitemeta} WHERE site_id = %d AND meta_key LIKE %s;",
					\get_current_network_id(),
					$opt_prefix . '%%'
				)

$wpdb->prepare(
					"SELECT ID FROM $wpdb->users WHERE user_login = %s OR ID = %d;",
					$user_login,
					$user_login
				)

$wpdb->prepare(
					"SELECT option_name, option_value FROM $options_table_name WHERE option_name LIKE %s", // phpcs:ignore WordPress.DB.PreparedSQL.InterpolatedNotPrepared
					'wsal_%'
				)

wp_kses( __( 'Use the Log level drop down menu above to use one of our preset log levels. Alternatively you can enable or disable any of the individual events from the below tabs. Refer to the complete list of WordPress activity log event IDs for reference on all the events the plugin can keep a log of.', 'wp-security-audit-log' ), Plugin_Settings_Helper::get_allowed_html_tags() )
$wpdb->prepare( "SELECT * FROM $wpdb->posts WHERE post_content LIKE %s AND post_name LIKE 'taxonomy%'", '%' . $taxonomy . '%' )

wp_kses( __( 'For security and auditing purposes, a record of all of your logged-in actions and changes within the WordPress dashboard will be recorded in an activity log with the WP Activity Log plugin. The audit log also includes the IP address where you accessed this site from.', 'wp-security-audit-log' ), Plugin_Settings_Helper::get_allowed_html_tags() )
